data.content: The project uses **MSTest v3.8.0** with the Microsoft Testing Platform (`TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport`). Tests are categorized — I'll filter for `Integration`.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Run integration tests filtered by category

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Run integration tests filtered by category

data.reasoningText:
The project uses **MSTest** (v3.8.0) with MSTest runner. The `Directory.Build.props` sets `TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport` to `true`, which means it uses the newer Microsoft Testing Platform integration with `dotnet test`.

The tests have categories: "Unit" and "Integration". The user wants to run only the integration tests.

With MSTest and the Microsoft Testing Platform, to filter by category I can use `--filter "TestCategory=Integration"`.

Let me run the tests.

arguments.description: Run integration tests filtered by category

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-085a43c16d8244fa9f202cc407554fbf && dotnet test --filter \"TestCategory=Integration\" --no-pager 2>&1", "description": "Run integration tests filtered by category", "initial_wait": 60}

toolArgs.description: Run integration tests filtered by category
